title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node.js and browsers; chat, stream, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI wrapper with fuzzy search, conversation persistence, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive streaming support.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models to any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter exposing OpenAI-compatible endpoints backed by Ollama for drop-in replacement.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with async/await and native JSON handling.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API for chatting with Ollama models, including admin UI and token-based auth.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module that spins up GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed and CloudWatch logging.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio, strongly typed requests/responses, and SSE streaming.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within notes via code-blocks.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama chat as a standardized MCP tool for Claude and other consumers.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models and optional fine-grained ACLs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for building pipelines.
